title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The RBI has revised the framework governing agency and referral businesses undertaken by UCBs. The amendments focus on responsible conduct, transparency, and enhanced customer safeguards.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
